app.apiTokenInvalid: Your TMDB token is invalid, not set or has been revoked. Movies and shows won't load.
app.apiUnreachable: Cannot reach TMDB, check your internet connection. Content may not load.

setup.title: STREAMBERT
setup.description: Enter your free TMDB Read Access Token to get started.
setup.copyToken: and copy the API Read Access Token (the long JWT, not the shorter API Key below).
setup.stepByStep: Step-by-step guide on how to get that Token
setup.placeholder: Paste your TMDB Read Access Token (eyJ...)...
setup.errorInvalidTokenBody: TMDB rejected the token (401 Unauthorized). Make sure you copied the Read Access Token (the long JWT), not the shorter API Key.
setup.errorForbiddenBody: TMDB returned 403 Forbidden. Your token may be valid but lacks the required permissions.
setup.errorTimeoutBody: TMDB took too long to respond. Check your internet connection and try again.
setup.errorUnreachableBody: No connection to api.themoviedb.org. Check your internet or try a VPN.
setup.errorGenericBody: TMDB returned an unexpected error ({{status}}). Please try again.

search.noInternet: No internet, search is unavailable offline.

shortcuts.title: KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS
shortcuts.needHelp: Need help or found a bug?
shortcuts.openIssue: Open an issue or browse the README on GitHub

closeConfirm.title: Download{{s}} in Progress
closeConfirm.body: {{count}} active download{{s}} will be cancelled and incomplete files will be deleted.

error.description: An unexpected error occurred in this section. Your data is safe, you can try reloading the app.

home.noInternetDesc: Trending and search require an internet connection. Your downloads and library still work offline.

library.title: My Library
library.subtitle: Watch history, progress, and saved titles
library.nothingHereDesc: Start watching a movie or series and your history will appear here.

downloads.title: DOWNLOADS
downloads.startDownloadDesc: Start a download from any movie or series page, or scan a folder to find local video files.

movie.restrictedDesc: This content is above your age limit setting.
movie.unreleasedDesc: This movie has not been released yet
movie.noAutoProgress: No automatic progress tracking for this source

tv.selectEpisode: Select an episode to start watching
tv.noAutoProgress: No automatic progress tracking for this source

downloadModal.chooseFolder: Choose where to save downloaded videos:
downloadModal.chooseFolderDesc: Choose where downloaded videos should be saved:
downloadModal.binaryNotFoundDesc: Place the vid-dl binary in the folder above, then click Re-check.
downloadModal.extractRelease: Extract the release into a folder of your choice
downloadModal.selectFolderBelow: Select that folder below, it must contain {{code1}} and the binary
downloadModal.permissionDenied: Permission denied, can't read the chosen folder.
downloadModal.folderUnreadable: Folder could not be read. Is it still accessible?
downloadModal.missingInternal: Missing {{code}} folder. Extract the full release archive, not just the binary.
downloadModal.noExecutable: No executable binary found. On Linux, make sure the binary has execute permissions ({{cmd}}).

update.title: UPDATE AVAILABLE
update.downloadsRunning: {{count}} download{{s}} running, finish or cancel them before updating.
update.noFormat: Could not detect install format. Use the GitHub releases page to download manually.

wyzie.title: Wyzie Subs requires an API key
wyzie.description: Wyzie Subs now requires a free API key. Claim one instantly by solving a quick captcha, no registration needed.
wyzie.getFreeKey: Get free key -- opens redeem page
wyzie.alreadyHaveKey: I already have a key -- enter manually
wyzie.pasteKey: Paste your Wyzie API key below.
wyzie.completeCaptcha: Complete the captcha in the popup window
wyzie.pleaseWait: Please wait -- key will be saved automatically...
wyzie.captchaNotCompleted: The captcha may not have been completed, or the redirect failed.
wyzie.couldNotExtract: Could not extract API key. Please copy it manually.

blocked.title: Ads & Trackers Blocked
blocked.startPlaying: Start playing content to see blocked ads & trackers.
blocked.noneYet: No ads or trackers blocked yet, play something to start.

group.generalSub: App version, updates, API credentials and Languages
group.contentSub: Parental controls and content filtering by age rating
group.subtitlesSub: Subtitle download source, preferred language, and API key
group.downloadsSub: Where downloaded video files are saved on disk
group.notificationsSub: Desktop alerts for downloads and new episode releases
group.interfaceSub: Home layout, start page, appearance, and display options
group.librarySub: Watchlist sort order and watch history preferences
group.backupSub: Export your data or restore from a previous backup file
group.storageSub: Clear cache, watch progress, downloads, or reset the entire app

version.title: App Version
version.autoCheckDesc: Shows a notification banner if a new version is available. Turned on by default.

tmdb.title: TMDB Read Access Token
tmdb.description: Used to fetch movie and TV metadata, posters, ratings, and cast info from The Movie Database.

tmdbLang.title: Metadata Language
tmdbLang.description: Language used when fetching titles, descriptions, and other metadata from TMDB. Note: some languages may have incomplete translations on TMDB's side.

appLanguage.title: App Language
appLanguage.description: Change the display language of the Streambert interface.

age.title: Age Rating & Parental Controls
age.description: Set a maximum age rating. Content rated above this age will still be visible but you won't be able to play it. Useful if children use this app.

invidious.title: Invidious Instance
invidious.description: Trailers are played via Invidious, a privacy-friendly YouTube frontend. Enter the URL of a public Invidious instance.
invidious.cannotReach: Could not reach instance. Check the URL or try another.

threshold.title: Auto-Watched Threshold
threshold.description: A movie or episode is automatically marked as Watched when the remaining time drops to this value or below.

introSkip.title: Anime Intro Skip
introSkip.description: Uses AniSkip to detect and skip opening/ending segments in anime episodes (AllManga source only).
introSkip.autoDesc: Automatically jumps past the intro/outro when reached.
introSkip.manualDesc: Shows a "Skip Intro" button at the bottom of the player.

subtitles.title: Subtitle Downloads
subtitles.wyzieDefault: Wyzie Subs is used by default and requires a free API key. SubDL is an alternative if you already have a key.
subtitles.requiredDesc: Required for Wyzie Subs. Claim a free key, no account needed.
subtitles.leaveEmpty: Leave empty to use Wyzie Subs as default subtitle source.

downloads.title: Download Folder
downloads.description: Downloaded videos will be saved here. Requires vid-dl binary to be placed in the same folder.
downloads.noFolder: No download folder set - videos cannot be downloaded until you set one.

notifications.title: Desktop Notifications
notifications.description: Control which events trigger a desktop notification.
notifications.downloadCompleteDesc: Shows a desktop notification when an item finishes downloading.
notifications.newEpisode: Notify about new episodes on startup
notifications.newEpisodeDesc: On startup, checks every TV series you have saved for newly released episodes. If any are found, a notification is shown.

homeLayout.title: Home Page Layout
homeLayout.description: Choose which rows appear on the Home page and drag to reorder them.

startPage.title: Start Page
startPage.description: Choose which page opens when you launch Streambert.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.appliedTo: applied to buttons, highlights, and indicators.
appearance.compactGridDesc: Shows more titles per row by reducing card size.
appearance.reduceAnimationsDesc: Disables transitions and hover effects throughout the app.

library.title: Library & Privacy
library.sortDesc: How titles in your watchlist are sorted.
library.recordHistoryDesc: When off, nothing you watch will be added to history or "Continue Watching".
library.historyDisabled: Watch history is disabled. Progress tracking and "Continue Watching" will not work.

backup.description: Export your watchlist, watch history, progress, and all settings to a JSON file. You can import this file later to restore your data.
backup.invalidFile: Invalid backup file, missing data field.
backup.scheduledDesc: Automatically save a backup file on a schedule.

storage.installLocationDesc: Opens the folder where Streambert is installed.
storage.clearCacheDesc: Removes temporary browser cache, shader cache, and cached API responses.
storage.clearProgressDesc: Resets all watch history, continue-watching progress, and episode tracking data.
storage.deleteAllDesc: Permanently deletes all video files that were downloaded through Streambert. This cannot be undone.
storage.resetDesc: Completely resets Streambert to factory defaults. Deletes all settings, watch history, saved titles, progress, downloads, and cached data.

confirm.resetDesc: This will permanently delete all your settings, watch history, saved titles, progress data, and cached data. You will need to re-enter your TMDB API token after resetting.
confirm.clearProgressDesc: This will permanently delete all watch history, continue-watching progress, and episode tracking. Your watchlist and settings will not be affected.
confirm.deleteAllDesc: This will permanently delete all video files downloaded through Streambert. This action cannot be undone.
